root_text.sn51.8:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu chandasamādhippadhānasaṅkhārasamannāgataṁ iddhipādaṁ bhāveti,
root_text.sn51.8:1.8: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, catunnaṁ iddhipādānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā tathāgato ‘arahaṁ sammāsambuddho’ti vuccatī”ti.

translation_text.sn51.8:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these four bases of psychic power.
translation_text.sn51.8:1.3: It’s when a mendicant develops the basis of psychic power that has immersion due to enthusiasm …
translation_text.sn51.8:1.7: These are the four bases of psychic power.
translation_text.sn51.8:1.8: It is because he has developed and cultivated these four bases of psychic power that the Realized One is called ‘the perfected one, the fully awakened Buddha’.”
